name: coffee-luxe-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker powering the Coffee Luxe AI assistant and order persistence. D1 for storage, Workers AI for inference, Vectorize for RAG.

scripts.seed: wrangler d1 execute coffee-luxe-db --command "SELECT id FROM rag_docs LIMIT 1" --remote >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'RAG already seeded' || (echo 'Seeding RAG…' && tsx src/seed.ts)
